Footer.aboutText: This website is maintained by Justin, focusing on frontend development and technology sharing, specializing in Vue 3, Nuxt, TypeScript and modern web technologies. Committed to creating clean, maintainable frontend applications with excellent user experience. Welcome to connect and collaborate.
Footer.contactText: Feel free to reach out to discuss collaboration opportunities.

leaveEmailNote: You can also just leave your email here, and we will contact you later to discuss the details.

emailStatus.success: Submitted! Thank you for leaving your email! We will contact you soon.
